text: isnt astra supposed to be the back end of this whole thing btw? XD
context: ASTRA = dashboard/control panel (frontend), Supabase = database/brain (backend), bonus page = customer-facing (frontend). ASTRA controls Supabase, bonus page reads from it.

text: i mean astra is good now in both computers what changed?
context: ASTRA works on both C1 and C2 but uses localStorage only - each browser sees different data. Supabase gives ASTRA real persistent memory that syncs across machines.

text: and go for FULL audit of what we currently have as static web! give me a full plan of action for sealing it what we have so we are ready if anything breaks, then NEW porject on ASTRA: Bonnus Page 2.0 and build a REAL CTO level project spect where we can understand each other and we do not change copy, design, Ui every push.

text: no wonder why even claude reading the memory was all lost
context: Different Claude accounts = different memory. Context from one account doesn't carry to the other. CLAUDE.md and gabo-messages.json are the only bridges.

text: now we are saving messages on bonuses.json while talking about another project. lets fix that on astra too right away

text: every project should have Gabo messages from the project.
context: RULE: Per-project message logs. saturno-bonus/logs/ = bonus messages. astra-command-center/logs/ = ASTRA messages. sm-app-copy-v1/logs/ = SM App messages. No more cross-contamination.
